mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.course_id) as totalCourses, SUM(s.total_study_time) as totalStudyTime, ROUND(AVG(s.assignment_completion), 2) as avgCompletionRate, ROUND(AVG(s.exam_avg_score), 1) as avgScore, MAX(s.last_active_time) as lastActiveTime FROM stat_learning_summary s WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.student_id) as totalStudents, ROUND(AVG(s.total_study_time), 2) as avgStudyTime, ROUND(AVG(s.assignment_completion), 2) as avgCompletionRate, ROUND(AVG(s.exam_avg_score), 1) as avgScore, COUNT(CASE WHEN s.assignment_completion >= 100 THEN 1 END) as completedCount FROM stat_learning_summary s WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId}

SELECT s.*, u.nickname as student_name, c.course_name FROM stat_learning_summary s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} AND s.course_id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.*, u.nickname as student_name, c.course_name FROM stat_learning_summary s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY s.last_active_time DESC

SELECT s.*, u.nickname as student_name, c.course_name FROM stat_learning_summary s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.student_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id WHERE s.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY s.last_active_time DESC
